rules.rule_text:
title: QR Code Phish
id: 7eac05f5-2173-4875-bb2e-456f419f162b
description: URL pattern observed in phishing documents containing QR codes for the
  user to scan
references:
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/f3390d9d9614ff905b1cbca770ca22d45f7aac47efd11027d5125694ad50e66f/behavior
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: 2024-09-07
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    cs-host|endswith: .workers.dev
    cs-uri-query|contains: qrc=
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
tags:
- attack.initial-access
